# popupWebView

**Instance Property**

A web view loaded with the pop-up page for this action, or `nil` if no pop-up is specified.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var popupWebView: WKWebView? { get }
```

## Discussion

The web view will be preloaded with the pop-up page upon first access or after it has been unloaded. Use the [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WKWebExtension/Action/presentsPopup] property to determine whether a pop-up should be displayed before using this property.

## Related Documentation

- **presentsPopup**: A Boolean value indicating whether the action has a pop-up.
